title: Kidplokio 2 in 1 Transforming Toys Robot RC Car Lights Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up
description:
These awesome 2 in 1 transforming toys from Kidplokio are so much fun, kids will have a blast watching them quickly transition from robot to race car and back again! With the push of a button on the remote control, the speedy race car transforms into a crime-fighting robot; with lights, music, and cool sound effects (quiet mode available if desired), pretend play sessions just reached next level fun! Easy to use, the remote control has been designed with little hands in mind, and allows kids to move the race car or robot forward, back, left, and right, and do 360-degree spins and turns

Kidplokio 2 in 1 Transforming Toys Robot RC Car Lights Sounds Boys Ages 3 and Up

These awesome 2 in 1 transforming toys from Kidplokio are so much fun, kids will have a blast watching them quickly transition from robot to race car and back again! With the push of a button on the remote control, the speedy race car transforms into a crime-fighting robot; with lights, music, and cool sound effects (quiet mode available if desired), pretend play sessions just reached next level fun!

Key Features

  • PLEASE NOTE: COLORS SHIP AT RANDOM
  • 2 IN 1 TRANSFORMING RC ROBOT RACE CARS: These awesome transforming toys quickly transition from a race car into a mighty robot with just one click of a button! Kids will love this totally fun toy, which also comes with music, cool sound effects (includes a quiet option), and flashing lights!
  • REMOTE CONTROL RC CARS: The easy-to-operate remote control allows little speed racers to move the cars forward, back, left, and right and do 360 turns; simply press the lower left button on the remote control to watch the car quickly transform into a robot and then back into a car again!
  • FINE MOTOR SKILLS: Kids will love all the features of this transforming robot and car combo, sure to keep them entertained for hours whether playing solo or with friends and family; plus, they’ll also be working on their hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills as they learn to operate the remote control
  • SPECIFICATIONS: Package Dimensions: 16 x 5 x 8 inches; Weight: 2.20lbs; Colors: Ship at random; Scale: 1:12; Battery Operated: Batteries not included; Ages: 3+

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TRNSFRMCRS2
  • UPC: 810058481269
  • Color: Assorted
  • Size: 16 in x 5 in x 8 in

Easy to use, the remote control has been designed with little hands in mind, and allows kids to move the race car or robot forward, back, left, and right, and do 360-degree spins and turns. Simply press the lower left button on the remote control to watch the car quickly transform into a robot and then back into a race car again!

Kids will love all the features of this transforming robot and car combo, sure to keep them entertained for hours, whether playing solo or with friends and family; plus, they’ll also be working on their hand-eye coordination and fine motor skills as they learn to operate the remote control.

PLEASE NOTE: COLORS SHIP AT RANDOM (Blue, Red, Gold, Yellow, Sapphire Blue, Transparent Red, Orange, Carbon Fiber)
